docket_entries.description: REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,995.00 FILED BY AL-CHOKHACHI, HASSAN AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTON, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF HASSAN AL-CHOKHACHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GARY SUTTON IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. ***DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE*** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AL-CHOKHACHI, HASSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUTTON, GARY $2,895.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,945.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
